rejected_candidates.title: Missing access control on write() function
rejected_candidates.reason: `write()` being public is not inherently a vulnerability for this pattern. The reportable harm comes from untrusted token/exchange inputs and whole-balance accounting, which are captured in other findings.

rejected_candidates.title: Unchecked return value on WETH.withdraw
rejected_candidates.reason: `IWETH.withdraw(uint256)` does not return a value in the referenced interface or canonical WETH9 implementation, so there is no ignored boolean result to check.
